flavorText: Great Old One warlocks draw on alien intellect, telepathy, and mind-breaking control.

features.description: You add spells to your warlock list: 1st (Dissonant Whispers, Tasha's Hideous Laughter), 3rd (Detect Thoughts, Phantasmal Force), 5th (Clairvoyance, Hunger of Hadar), 7th (Evard's Black Tentacles, Dominate Beast), 9th (Dominate Person, Telekinesis).
You can communicate telepathically with any creature you can see within 30 feet.
As a reaction, impose disadvantage on an attack against you; if it misses, you gain advantage on your next attack against that creature.
Your mind is warded: resistance to psychic damage and immunity to telepathic intrusion you do not permit.
Touch an incapacitated humanoid to charm it indefinitely until the effect is broken.

goo-expanded-spells.summary: Your expanded list leans into alien knowledge, distortion, and mind pressure.
goo-expanded-spells.description: Expanded Spells here should imply that the subclass solves problems through thought, madness, and impossible perception rather than elemental force.

goo-awakened-mind.summary: You can speak directly into minds, reinforcing the subclass as unsettling, invasive, and quietly powerful.
goo-awakened-mind.description: Awakened Mind is one of the easiest features for players to understand in-fiction. It turns the warlock into a presence that bypasses normal communication entirely.

goo-entropic-ward.summary: Warp fate around an incoming attack, then seize the opening it creates.
goo-entropic-ward.description: Entropic Ward is a reaction-based defense that fits the patron’s reality-bending theme and rewards timing.

goo-thought-shield.summary: Mental intrusion becomes far less safe against you, and psychic pressure can rebound onto those who try it.
goo-thought-shield.description: Thought Shield helps the subclass feel like a mind too strange to attack cleanly on psychic terms.

goo-create-thrall.summary: Your patron’s influence can burrow into another creature so deeply that domination becomes long-term and unsettling.
goo-create-thrall.description: Create Thrall is the capstone social-control fantasy of the subclass, and it should read as eerie, manipulative, and profoundly invasive.
